name: Spanish Rice (Majors)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Transfer mixture to a baking dish and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until heated through and bubbly.
3. Fluff with a fork before serving.
4. Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1/2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
